abort.single_instance_allowed: Only a single configuration of SmartThinQ LGE Sensors is allowed.
abort.no_smartthinq_devices: No SmartThinQ devices found. Component setup aborted.
abort.unsupported_version: This integration require at least HomeAssistant version {req_ver}, you are running version {run_ver}.

error.error_connect: Error connecting to SmartThinQ. Try again, and make sure you can access the ThinQ app on your phone.
error.error_url: Error retrieving login URL from ThinQ.
error.invalid_url: Invalid redirection URL. Make sure you can access the ThinQ app on your phone.
error.invalid_credentials: Invalid SmartThinQ credentials. Use the LG App on your mobile device to verify if there are Term of Service to accept. Account based on social network are not supported and in most case do not work with this integration.
error.official_terms_not_accepted: The LG ThinQ Connect service terms are not accepted for this account.
error.official_api_not_allowed: The LG ThinQ Connect API rejected this PAT for the requested operation.
error.official_country_not_supported: The selected country is not supported by LG ThinQ Connect.
error.official_api_calls_exceeded: The number of LG ThinQ Connect API calls has been exceeded.
error.official_user_api_calls_exceeded: The number of LG ThinQ Connect user API calls has been exceeded.
error.no_user_info: User Name and Password are required.

data.use_ha_session: Share Home Assistant HTTP connection (may cause SSL errors)
data.use_tls_v1: Force use of protocol TLSv1 (sometimes required)
data.exclude_dh: Do not use DH cypher (in case 'dh key too small' error)

user.description: Insert your SmartThinQ account access information. LG official PAT is optional, and is used for the direct official ThinQ Connect hybrid path.

url.description: Use the URL in the first field to perform login to SmartThinQ with your credentials, then paste the URL where the browser is redirected after the login in the second field. Share feedback about your setup [here]({pat_url}).
url.title: SmartThinQ LGE Sensors - Authentication

token.description: Save the generated token for future use, then confirm to complete the configuration.
token.title: SmartThinQ LGE Sensors - New refresh token

data.reauth_cred: Check this option if you need to enter new ThinQ credential

reauth_confirm.title: SmartThinQ LGE Sensors - Reauth
reauth_confirm.description: Invalid ThinQ credential error, integration setup aborted. Please use the LG App on your mobile device and check if there are new Term of Service to accept, then press ok to reload integration. If you already have a valid community token and only need to update the LG official PAT, check the box and update that field on the next step.

reconfigure.title: SmartThinQ LGE Sensors - Reconfigure
reconfigure.description: LG official PAT is optional. Leave it empty to keep running with the community ThinQ flow only, or enter a PAT to enable the direct official ThinQ Connect hybrid path.

missing_official_pat.title: {title} is running without an LG official PAT
missing_official_pat.description: The integration will continue using the community ThinQ flow, but official ThinQ Connect data and MQTT-based polling reduction are disabled until an LG official PAT is configured.

error.error_connect: Error connecting to LG ThinQ Connect. Try again in a moment.
error.official_terms_not_accepted: The LG ThinQ Connect service terms are not accepted for this account.
error.official_api_not_allowed: The LG ThinQ Connect API rejected this PAT for the requested operation.
error.official_country_not_supported: The selected country is not supported by LG ThinQ Connect.
error.official_api_calls_exceeded: The number of LG ThinQ Connect API calls has been exceeded.
error.official_user_api_calls_exceeded: The number of LG ThinQ Connect user API calls has been exceeded.

init.description: Enter an LG official PAT to enable the direct official ThinQ Connect hybrid path for {title}.
init.title: Add LG official PAT
